---
title: "Approve attestation"
date: last-modified
aliases:
  - /guide/approve-attestation.html
---

Approve an attestation to formally certify the model attributes at a specific point in time. This process involves final review and electronic signature of the attestation by authorized approvers.

::: {.attn}

## Prerequisites

- [x] {{< var link.login >}}
- [x] The model is already registered in the model inventory.[^1]
- [x] An attestation has been reviewed and accepted.[^2]
- [x] You are an authorized approver with sufficient permissions to approve attestations.[^3]

:::

## Steps

1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa cubes >}} Inventory**.

2. Select a model or find your model by applying a filter or searching for it.[^4]

3. In the left sidebar that appears for your model, click **{{< fa shield >}} Validation Report**.

4. Locate the attestation in the **Attestations** section and click on it to open the approval interface.

5. Review the attestation content and validator feedback:
   - Model snapshot and findings at the time of attestation creation
   - Custom fields and their values
   - Questionnaire responses
   - Compliance requirements
   - Document sections and guidelines
   - Validator comments and flags

6. Add your electronic signature:
   - Click **{{< fa signature >}} Sign Attestation**
   - Enter your credentials to confirm your identity
   - Add any final notes or comments

7. Complete the approval:
   - Click **{{< fa check >}} Finalize Approval** to complete the attestation process
   - The attestation status will update to "Signed Off"

::: {.callout}
Once an attestation is signed off, it becomes a permanent record and cannot be modified. The system documents who changed attestation statuses for audit purposes.
:::

## What's next

- [Manage attestation templates](manage-attestation-templates.qmd)
- [Export documentation](/guide/model-documentation/export-documentation.qmd)

<!-- FOOTNOTES -->

[^1]: [Register models in the inventory](/guide/model-inventory/register-models-in-inventory.qmd)

[^2]: [Review attestation](review-attestation.qmd)

[^3]: [Manage permissions](/guide/configuration/manage-permissions.qmd)

[^4]: [Working with the model inventory](/guide/model-inventory/working-with-model-inventory.qmd#search-filter-and-sort-models)
